# Update Playbook

A skill that evaluates the current conversation and proposes updates to your Packmind playbook (standards, commands, skills).

## When to Use

Use after any coding session where:
- New patterns emerged
- Existing standards were followed or violated
- Decisions were made about code style or architecture

The agent will:
1. Summarize what happened in the session
2. Scan existing standards, commands, and skills
3. Propose a consolidated change report
4. Apply approved changes and submit via CLI

## Prerequisites

- \`packmind\` installed and logged in
- Packmind organization with existing artifacts
